overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an ancient Greek city exploration game. The player character walks through stone-paved courtyards, enters the Prytaneion building with its columned interior, and exits to a grand plaza featuring colossal bronze warrior statues and monumental temple architecture carved into a mountainside.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone courtyard leading to temple entrance

events.description: entering the Prytaneion building from the sunlit exterior into the shaded interior

agents.ego_description: walking up stone steps toward the grand building entrance

entered.detail: stone base with a bronze statue atop it flanking the entrance stairs
wide stone staircase leading up to the building entrance
ornate stone exterior with carved reliefs and a triangular pediment above the doorway
carved stone frieze depicting figures and patterns on the building exterior
large terracotta planter containing an olive tree beside the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a grand stone temple facade, ascending the wide steps toward the entrance. Sunlight casts sharp shadows across the paved courtyard as the character moves from the open exterior into the shadowed doorway.

events.description: moving from the shaded entrance into the sunlit central courtyard area

agents.ego_description: walking through the columned courtyard observing the classical architecture

notable_agents.action: seated on a wooden bench reading a scroll

entered.detail: tall stone columns with fluted shafts and dark blue painted bases surrounding the courtyard
decorative draped cloths hanging between the columns under the roofline
simple wooden bench where a scholar sits reading
intricate wooden lattice screens on the interior walls
large stone planter with vibrant red flowers on a pedestal

segments.scene_description: Inside the Prytaneion, the character moves through a peristyle courtyard surrounded by fluted columns with dark blue bases. A seated scholar reads on a bench while sunlight streams through the open roof, illuminating hanging fabrics and potted flowers.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with central statue and altar near the exit

events.description: approaching the exit doorway leading from the interior back to the exterior
turning toward the exit passage to leave the building

agents.ego_description: circling the courtyard to view the central statue and locate the exit doorway

notable_agents.action: standing near the altar gesturing with hands as if giving a speech

entered.detail: tall marble statue of a robed figure holding a staff on a circular pedestal
rectangular stone altar with carved details in the center of the courtyard
doorway leading out of the Prytaneion to the exterior plaza

segments.scene_description: The character explores deeper into the courtyard, passing a large robed statue and an altar where a man in blue robes gestures expressively. The camera moves toward the far exit, transitioning from the shaded interior back toward bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental plaza with colossal statues and grand temple staircase

events.description: exiting the Prytaneion into the bright open plaza with colossal bronze statues
beginning to ascend the wide grand staircase toward the temple

agents.ego_description: walking out into the sunlit plaza and climbing the monumental steps toward the temple complex

notable_agents.action: two citizens standing and admiring the colossal statues

entered.detail: massive bronze warrior statues holding spears and shields flanking the staircase
wide stone steps leading up to the temple entrance
sheer rocky cliff face into which the temple is built
monumental freestanding columns with red and white banding
mature olive tree growing from a rocky outcrop in the plaza

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the Prytaneion, the scene opens into a vast sunlit plaza dominated by colossal bronze warrior statues flanking a grand staircase. The character ascends the steps toward a monumental temple carved into the rock face above, while other citizens mill about the cobblestone square admiring the statues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the bright exterior of a stone temple, through a shaded inner sanctuary, and out into a monumental public plaza. It begins with the character ascending wide stone steps toward a grand facade, moving from the sharp sunlight of the courtyard into the cool shadows of the doorway. As the camera enters the Prytaneion, the scene shifts to a peristyle courtyard where sunlight streams through an open roof to illuminate fluted columns, hanging fabrics, and a seated scholar. The movement continues deeper into the interior, passing a robed statue and a gesturing figure at an altar before turning toward the far exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the shade into a vast, sunlit plaza dominated by colossal bronze warrior statues and a grand staircase leading toward a temple carved directly into the mountainside.
